principle: Counsel is role-based first and model-based second.
sources: Artificial Analysis intelligence, speed, latency, and cost
SWE-rebench and SWE-bench style software-agent results
Hugging Face open-weight discovery and sanity checks

facilitator.purpose: Keep the counsel structured, short, and decision-oriented.

product_framer.purpose: Extract final user experience, fidelity anchors, and emotional target.

systems_reviewer.purpose: Assess architecture, feasibility, implementation risks, and dependency boundaries.

red_team.purpose: Challenge assumptions and expose failure modes.

secretary.purpose: Compress independent views into one decision artifact.

current_free_candidate_pool.notes: OpenRouter free-model page lists strong usage and agentic workflow positioning.
OpenRouter describes 1M context and benchmark strength claims.
Coding-agent model; role fit should be verified locally before relying on it.
Useful diversity candidate; current free listing should be rechecked before use.
Good pragmatic execution candidate; verify availability and rate limits.
Useful secretary or product-framing candidate if output style is stable.

lite.rule: Use one role specialist, one different-family challenger, and one compressor.

full.rule: Use only for long-horizon product shaping or major architecture direction.

refresh_rule: Refresh candidates before wiring live OpenRouter calls; do not assume this snapshot stays correct.
